Device.Name: MR3107-2001-2245 1-channel reversing motor starter, replaceable fuses, 7 A, safe shutdown, B23
MR3107-2001-2245 1-Kanal-Motor-Wendestarter, austauschbare Sicherungen, 7 A, sicheres Abschalten, B23

EnumInfo.Text: Motor brake applied: Brake is locked, axis cannot move
Motor brake released: Brake is unlocked, axis can rotate

SubItem.Name: Warning
SubItem.Comment: Collective warning

SubItem.Name: Error
SubItem.Comment: Collective error

SubItem.Name: Motor Enabled
SubItem.Comment: Output for the motor is active

SubItem.Name: Brake Released
SubItem.Comment: Output for the brake is active depending on "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Warning
SubItem.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Warning Threshold (0x8xx0:29)"
The diagnosis "Motor I2T Warning" bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Error
SubItem.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Error Threshold(0x8xx0:2A)"
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Warning
SubItem.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Warning Threshold (0x8xx1:21)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Error
SubItem.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx1:20)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Brake Warning
SubItem.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Warning Threshold"(8xx1:1F) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Warning Threshold(8xx1:20)" while the brake is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Brake Error
SubItem.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Error Threshold"(8xx1:1D) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Error Threshold(8xx1:21)" while the brake is enabled.
The "Brake Error" is also true, if a short circuit was detected, or the brake voltage is missing.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load Warning
SubItem.Comment:
The internal startup utilization approaches the internal device limit.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load Error
SubItem.Comment:
The internal startup utilization exceeded the internal device limit.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Enable Motor
SubItem.Comment: Enable motor output

SubItem.Name: Reverse Direction
SubItem.Comment:
Reverse motor direction by swapping T1 with T3.
This operation will only be performed, while the motor is not enabled.

SubItem.Name: Manual Brake Release
SubItem.Comment:
Enable/disable brake output driver depending on the setting "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"
Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Manual"

SubItem.Name: Stand Still Detected
SubItem.Comment: Apply Brake Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Stand Still"

SubItem.Name: Reset
SubItem.Comment: Acknowledge error. To perform an acknowledgement, a rising edge must be generated.

SubItem.Name: Enable Wire Break Detection
SubItem.Comment:
Enabled: The system continuously computes the cumulative current across each motor phase pair to monitor cable integrity. If a discontinuity indicative of a conductor break is detected, the output is automatically deactivated to prevent potential damage or unsafe operation.
Disabled: Phase-current monitoring is performed without intervention. A detected discontinuity (cable break) does not trigger a motor shutdown, and the output continues operation irrespective of the fault condition.

SubItem.Name: Rated Current
SubItem.Comment: Motor rated current in A

SubItem.Name: Overload Trip Class
SubItem.Comment:
Motor overload trip class according to IEC 60947-4-2
0x03E8: Trip class 2E 0x07D0: Trip class 3E 0x0FA0: Trip class 5E 0x1770: Trip class 10A 0x1B58: Trip class 10E 0x3A98: Trip class 20E 0x61A8: Trip class 30E 0x88B8: Trip class 40E

SubItem.Name: I2T Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: I2T model Motor utilization warning threshold in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: I2T Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: I2T model Motor utilization error threshold in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Safe State Behavior
SubItem.Comment: Defines the Behavior of the motor output in EtherCAT states below OP 0x00: Switch Motor off 0x01: Switch Motor on 0x10: Keep Last State 0xFF: Error State

SubItem.Name: Enable Manual Brake Operation
SubItem.Comment: Enable manual brake operation

SubItem.Name: Manual Brake State
SubItem.Comment: Brake state if "Enable Manual Brake Operation(0x8xx1:01)" is true 0: Release 1: Apply

SubItem.Name: Brake Operation
SubItem.Comment: Options for brake operation/ brake type selection: 0x00: Brake not used 0x01: Brake operation after delay 0x02: Brake controlled by PDO "Control.Manual Brake Release(0x7xx0:03)" 0x03: Use PDO "Control.Stand Still(0x7xx0:04)" to apply brake

SubItem.Name: Brake Option
SubItem.Comment: Options for brake operation / brake type selection 0: Enable output to release brake 1: Disable output to apply brake

SubItem.Name: Release Delay
SubItem.Comment:
Delay time to let brake release before the motor is enabled.
Only used if the Brake Setting "Brake Operation" is set to: - "0x01: Brake Delay" - "0x03: Stand Still
Delay time in ms

SubItem.Name: Application Delay
SubItem.Comment:
Time after disabling the Motor, until brake is going to be applied.
Only used if the Brake Setting "Brake Operation" is set to: - "0x01: Brake operation after delay"
Delay time in ms

SubItem.Name: Lower Current Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Lower fault threshold for motor brake current (cable break)

SubItem.Name: Lower Current Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Lower warning threshold for motor brake current (cable break)

SubItem.Name: Upper Current Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Upper warning threshold for motor brake current (short circuit)

SubItem.Name: Upper Current Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Upper fault threshold for motor brake current (short circuit)

SubItem.Name: Limit Delay
SubItem.Comment: Time until current thresholds are active

SubItem.Name: Over-Temperature Protection
SubItem.Comment:
Enable motor temperature protection.
Disables output if the motor temperature is greater than the "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx2:20)"

SubItem.Name: RTD Element
SubItem.Comment: Temperature sensor type

SubItem.Name: Temperature Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Motor temperature sensor error threshold in 0.1°C

SubItem.Name: Temperature Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Motor temperature sensor warning threshold in 0.1°C

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T2 Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T2 Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T3 Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T3 Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Brake Current Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Brake Current Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: RTD Resistance Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for RTD measurement

SubItem.Name: RTD Resistance Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for RTD measurement

SubItem.Name: Actual Motor Brake State
SubItem.Comment:
Indication of the motor brake state including all overrides and output inversions.
0 = Motor brake applied: Brake is locked, axis cannot move
1 = Motor brake released: Brake is unlocked, axis can rotate

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current
SubItem.Comment: RMS motor current in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T1
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T1 in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T2
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T2 in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T3
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T3 in A

SubItem.Name: Brake Current
SubItem.Comment: Brake current in A

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load
SubItem.Comment: Internal utilization in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Load
SubItem.Comment: Motor utilization in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Value
SubItem.Comment: Motor Temperature Value unit verifies from selected "RTD Settings.RTD Element(0x8xx2:19)" : Temperature in 0.1°C Resistance in Ohm Thermal contact NO: 1->open, 0->closed Thermal contact NC: 1->closed, 0->open

SubItem.Name: Voltage Detected L1
SubItem.Comment: True if supply voltage is detected

SubItem.Name: Voltage Detected L2
SubItem.Comment: True if supply voltage is detected

SubItem.Name: Voltage Detected L3
SubItem.Comment: True if supply voltage is detected

SubItem.Name: Fuse I4T Load L1
SubItem.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Fuse I4T Load L2
SubItem.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Fuse I4T Load L3
SubItem.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: PCB Temperature
SubItem.Comment: PCB temperature in °C

SubItem.Name: Frequency L1
SubItem.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

SubItem.Name: Frequency L2
SubItem.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

SubItem.Name: Frequency L3
SubItem.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

DiagMessage.MessageText: PD-Watchdog / Watchdog der Feldseite hat zugeschlagen
Eine der Netzphasen (L1,L2,L3) ist ausgefallen und nicht vorhanden
One of the grid phases (L1,L2,L3) is lost and not there

Entry.Name: Enable Motor
Entry.Comment: Enable motor output

Entry.Name: Reverse Direction
Entry.Comment:
Reverse motor direction by swapping T1 with T3.
This operation will only be performed, while the motor is not enabled.

Entry.Name: Manual Brake Release
Entry.Comment:
Enable/disable brake output driver depending on the setting "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"
Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Manual"

Entry.Name: Stand Still Detected
Entry.Comment: Apply Brake Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Stand Still"

Entry.Name: Reset
Entry.Comment: Acknowledge error. To perform an acknowledgement, a rising edge must be generated.

Entry.Name: Warning
Entry.Comment: Collective warning

Entry.Name: Error
Entry.Comment: Collective error

Entry.Name: Motor Enabled
Entry.Comment: Output for the motor is active

Entry.Name: Brake Released
Entry.Comment: Output for the brake is active depending on "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Warning
Entry.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Warning Threshold (0x8xx0:29)"
The diagnosis "Motor I2T Warning" bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Error
Entry.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Error Threshold(0x8xx0:2A)"
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Warning
Entry.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Warning Threshold (0x8xx1:21)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Error
Entry.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx1:20)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Brake Warning
Entry.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Warning Threshold"(8xx1:1F) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Warning Threshold(8xx1:20)" while the brake is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Brake Error
Entry.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Error Threshold"(8xx1:1D) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Error Threshold(8xx1:21)" while the brake is enabled.
The "Brake Error" is also true, if a short circuit was detected, or the brake voltage is missing.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load Warning
Entry.Comment:
The internal startup utilization approaches the internal device limit.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load Error
Entry.Comment:
The internal startup utilization exceeded the internal device limit.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: RMS Motor Current
Entry.Comment: RMS motor current in A

Entry.Name: Brake Current
Entry.Comment: Brake current in A

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load
Entry.Comment: Internal utilization in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Load
Entry.Comment: Motor utilization in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Value
Entry.Comment: Motor Temperature Value unit verifies from selected "RTD Settings.RTD Element(0x8xx2:19)" : Temperature in 0.1°C Resistance in Ohm Thermal contact NO: 1->open, 0->closed Thermal contact NC: 1->closed, 0->open

Entry.Name: Fuse I4T Load L1
Entry.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Fuse I4T Load L2
Entry.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Fuse I4T Load L3
Entry.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Frequency L1
Entry.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

Entry.Name: Frequency L2
Entry.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

Entry.Name: Frequency L3
Entry.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

Entry.Name: PCB Temperature
Entry.Comment: PCB temperature in °C

Device.Name: MR3203-1001-2244 2-channel direct motor starter, replaceable fuses, 2.8 A, safe shutdown, B17
MR3203-1001-2244 2-Kanal-Motor-Direktstarter, austauschbare Sicherungen, 2,8 A, B17

EnumInfo.Text: Motor brake applied: Brake is locked, axis cannot move
Motor brake released: Brake is unlocked, axis can rotate

SubItem.Name: Warning
SubItem.Comment: Collective warning

SubItem.Name: Error
SubItem.Comment: Collective error

SubItem.Name: Motor Enabled
SubItem.Comment: Output for the motor is active

SubItem.Name: Brake Released
SubItem.Comment: Output for the brake is active depending on "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Warning
SubItem.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Warning Threshold (0x8xx0:29)"
The diagnosis "Motor I2T Warning" bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Error
SubItem.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Error Threshold(0x8xx0:2A)"
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Warning
SubItem.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Warning Threshold (0x8xx1:21)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Error
SubItem.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx1:20)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Brake Warning
SubItem.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Warning Threshold"(8xx1:1F) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Warning Threshold(8xx1:20)" while the brake is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Brake Error
SubItem.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Error Threshold"(8xx1:1D) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Error Threshold(8xx1:21)" while the brake is enabled.
The "Brake Error" is also true, if a short circuit was detected, or the brake voltage is missing.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load Warning
SubItem.Comment:
The internal startup utilization approaches the internal device limit.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load Error
SubItem.Comment:
The internal startup utilization exceeded the internal device limit.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

SubItem.Name: Enable Motor
SubItem.Comment: Enable motor output

SubItem.Name: Manual Brake Release
SubItem.Comment:
Enable/disable brake output driver depending on the setting "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"
Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Manual"

SubItem.Name: Stand Still Detected
SubItem.Comment: Apply Brake Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Stand Still"

SubItem.Name: Reset
SubItem.Comment: Acknowledge error. To perform an acknowledgement, a rising edge must be generated.

SubItem.Name: Enable Wire Break Detection
SubItem.Comment:
Enabled: The system continuously computes the cumulative current across each motor phase pair to monitor cable integrity. If a discontinuity indicative of a conductor break is detected, the output is automatically deactivated to prevent potential damage or unsafe operation.
Disabled: Phase-current monitoring is performed without intervention. A detected discontinuity (cable break) does not trigger a motor shutdown, and the output continues operation irrespective of the fault condition.

SubItem.Name: Rated Current
SubItem.Comment: Motor rated current in A

SubItem.Name: Overload Trip Class
SubItem.Comment:
Motor overload trip class according to IEC 60947-4-2
0x03E8: Trip class 2E 0x07D0: Trip class 3E 0x0FA0: Trip class 5E 0x1770: Trip class 10A 0x1B58: Trip class 10E 0x3A98: Trip class 20E 0x61A8: Trip class 30E 0x88B8: Trip class 40E

SubItem.Name: I2T Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: I2T model Motor utilization warning threshold in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: I2T Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: I2T model Motor utilization error threshold in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Safe State Behavior
SubItem.Comment: Defines the Behavior of the motor output in EtherCAT states below OP 0x00: Switch Motor off 0x01: Switch Motor on 0x10: Keep Last State 0xFF: Error State

SubItem.Name: Enable Manual Brake Operation
SubItem.Comment: Enable manual brake operation

SubItem.Name: Manual Brake State
SubItem.Comment: Brake state if "Enable Manual Brake Operation(0x8xx1:01)" is true 0: Release 1: Apply

SubItem.Name: Brake Operation
SubItem.Comment: Options for brake operation/ brake type selection: 0x00: Brake not used 0x01: Brake operation after delay 0x02: Brake controlled by PDO "Control.Manual Brake Release(0x7xx0:03)" 0x03: Use PDO "Control.Stand Still(0x7xx0:04)" to apply brake

SubItem.Name: Brake Option
SubItem.Comment: Options for brake operation / brake type selection 0: Enable output to release brake 1: Disable output to apply brake

SubItem.Name: Release Delay
SubItem.Comment:
Delay time to let brake release before the motor is enabled.
Only used if the Brake Setting "Brake Operation" is set to: - "0x01: Brake Delay" - "0x03: Stand Still
Delay time in ms

SubItem.Name: Application Delay
SubItem.Comment:
Time after disabling the Motor, until brake is going to be applied.
Only used if the Brake Setting "Brake Operation" is set to: - "0x01: Brake operation after delay"
Delay time in ms

SubItem.Name: Lower Current Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Lower fault threshold for motor brake current (cable break)

SubItem.Name: Lower Current Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Lower warning threshold for motor brake current (cable break)

SubItem.Name: Upper Current Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Upper warning threshold for motor brake current (short circuit)

SubItem.Name: Upper Current Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Upper fault threshold for motor brake current (short circuit)

SubItem.Name: Limit Delay
SubItem.Comment: Time until current thresholds are active

SubItem.Name: Over-Temperature Protection
SubItem.Comment:
Enable motor temperature protection.
Disables output if the motor temperature is greater than the "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx2:20)"

SubItem.Name: RTD Element
SubItem.Comment: Temperature sensor type

SubItem.Name: Temperature Error Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Motor temperature sensor error threshold in 0.1°C

SubItem.Name: Temperature Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Motor temperature sensor warning threshold in 0.1°C

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T2 Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T2 Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T3 Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Motor Current T3 Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Brake Current Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Brake Current Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: RTD Resistance Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for RTD measurement

SubItem.Name: RTD Resistance Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for RTD measurement

SubItem.Name: Actual Motor Brake State
SubItem.Comment:
Indication of the motor brake state including all overrides and output inversions.
0 = Motor brake applied: Brake is locked, axis cannot move
1 = Motor brake released: Brake is unlocked, axis can rotate

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current
SubItem.Comment: RMS motor current in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T1
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T1 in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T2
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T2 in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T3
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T3 in A

SubItem.Name: Brake Current
SubItem.Comment: Brake current in A

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load
SubItem.Comment: Internal utilization in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Load
SubItem.Comment: Motor utilization in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Value
SubItem.Comment: Motor Temperature Value unit verifies from selected "RTD Settings.RTD Element(0x8xx2:19)" : Temperature in 0.1°C Resistance in Ohm Thermal contact NO: 1->open, 0->closed Thermal contact NC: 1->closed, 0->open

SubItem.Name: Actual Motor Brake State
SubItem.Comment:
Indication of the motor brake state including all overrides and output inversions.
0 = Motor brake applied: Brake is locked, axis cannot move
1 = Motor brake released: Brake is unlocked, axis can rotate

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current
SubItem.Comment: RMS motor current in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T1
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T1 in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T2
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T2 in A

SubItem.Name: RMS Motor Current T3
SubItem.Comment: Rms motor current T3 in A

SubItem.Name: Brake Current
SubItem.Comment: Brake current in A

SubItem.Name: Start-Up Load
SubItem.Comment: Internal utilization in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Motor I2T Load
SubItem.Comment: Motor utilization in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Motor Temperature Value
SubItem.Comment: Motor Temperature Value unit verifies from selected "RTD Settings.RTD Element(0x8xx2:19)" : Temperature in 0.1°C Resistance in Ohm Thermal contact NO: 1->open, 0->closed Thermal contact NC: 1->closed, 0->open

SubItem.Name: Voltage Detected L1
SubItem.Comment: True if supply voltage is detected

SubItem.Name: Voltage Detected L2
SubItem.Comment: True if supply voltage is detected

SubItem.Name: Voltage Detected L3
SubItem.Comment: True if supply voltage is detected

SubItem.Name: Fuse I4T Load L1
SubItem.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Fuse I4T Load L2
SubItem.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: Fuse I4T Load L3
SubItem.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

SubItem.Name: PCB Temperature
SubItem.Comment: PCB temperature in °C

SubItem.Name: Frequency L1
SubItem.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

SubItem.Name: Frequency L2
SubItem.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

SubItem.Name: Frequency L3
SubItem.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

DiagMessage.MessageText: PD-Watchdog / Watchdog der Feldseite hat zugeschlagen
Eine der Netzphasen (L1,L2,L3) ist ausgefallen und nicht vorhanden
One of the grid phases (L1,L2,L3) is lost and not there
Range error of RTD measurement Ch.%d

Entry.Name: Enable Motor
Entry.Comment: Enable motor output

Entry.Name: Manual Brake Release
Entry.Comment:
Enable/disable brake output driver depending on the setting "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"
Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Manual"

Entry.Name: Stand Still Detected
Entry.Comment: Apply Brake Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Stand Still"

Entry.Name: Reset
Entry.Comment: Acknowledge error. To perform an acknowledgement, a rising edge must be generated.

Entry.Name: Enable Motor
Entry.Comment: Enable motor output

Entry.Name: Manual Brake Release
Entry.Comment:
Enable/disable brake output driver depending on the setting "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"
Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Manual"

Entry.Name: Stand Still Detected
Entry.Comment: Apply Brake Can only be performed if Setting "Brake Operation" is in "Stand Still"

Entry.Name: Reset
Entry.Comment: Acknowledge error. To perform an acknowledgement, a rising edge must be generated.

Entry.Name: Warning
Entry.Comment: Collective warning

Entry.Name: Error
Entry.Comment: Collective error

Entry.Name: Motor Enabled
Entry.Comment: Output for the motor is active

Entry.Name: Brake Released
Entry.Comment: Output for the brake is active depending on "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Warning
Entry.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Warning Threshold (0x8xx0:29)"
The diagnosis "Motor I2T Warning" bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Error
Entry.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Error Threshold(0x8xx0:2A)"
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Warning
Entry.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Warning Threshold (0x8xx1:21)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Error
Entry.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx1:20)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Brake Warning
Entry.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Warning Threshold"(8xx1:1F) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Warning Threshold(8xx1:20)" while the brake is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Brake Error
Entry.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Error Threshold"(8xx1:1D) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Error Threshold(8xx1:21)" while the brake is enabled.
The "Brake Error" is also true, if a short circuit was detected, or the brake voltage is missing.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load Warning
Entry.Comment:
The internal startup utilization approaches the internal device limit.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load Error
Entry.Comment:
The internal startup utilization exceeded the internal device limit.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: RMS Motor Current
Entry.Comment: RMS motor current in A

Entry.Name: Brake Current
Entry.Comment: Brake current in A

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load
Entry.Comment: Internal utilization in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Load
Entry.Comment: Motor utilization in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Value
Entry.Comment: Motor Temperature Value unit verifies from selected "RTD Settings.RTD Element(0x8xx2:19)" : Temperature in 0.1°C Resistance in Ohm Thermal contact NO: 1->open, 0->closed Thermal contact NC: 1->closed, 0->open

Entry.Name: Warning
Entry.Comment: Collective warning

Entry.Name: Error
Entry.Comment: Collective error

Entry.Name: Motor Enabled
Entry.Comment: Output for the motor is active

Entry.Name: Brake Released
Entry.Comment: Output for the brake is active depending on "Brake Option(0x8xx1:05)"

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Warning
Entry.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Warning Threshold (0x8xx0:29)"
The diagnosis "Motor I2T Warning" bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Error
Entry.Comment:
Motor utilization exceeded the threshold "I2T Error Threshold(0x8xx0:2A)"
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Warning
Entry.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Warning Threshold (0x8xx1:21)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Error
Entry.Comment:
Motor temperature exceeded the threshold of "Temperature Error Threshold (0x8xx1:20)" and the "Overtemperature Protection(0x8xx1:03)" is enabled.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Brake Warning
Entry.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Warning Threshold"(8xx1:1F) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Warning Threshold(8xx1:20)" while the brake is enabled.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Brake Error
Entry.Comment:
The measured brake current is lower than the setting "Lower Current Error Threshold"(8xx1:1D) or greater than the setting "Upper Current Error Threshold(8xx1:21)" while the brake is enabled.
The "Brake Error" is also true, if a short circuit was detected, or the brake voltage is missing.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load Warning
Entry.Comment:
The internal startup utilization approaches the internal device limit.
This diagnosis bit is self-acknowledging.

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load Error
Entry.Comment:
The internal startup utilization exceeded the internal device limit.
To acknowledge this diagnosis bit, the user has to generate a rising edge at the output bit "Reset"(6xx0:08).

Entry.Name: RMS Motor Current
Entry.Comment: RMS motor current in A

Entry.Name: Brake Current
Entry.Comment: Brake current in A

Entry.Name: Start-Up Load
Entry.Comment: Internal utilization in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Motor I2T Load
Entry.Comment: Motor utilization in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Motor Temperature Value
Entry.Comment: Motor Temperature Value unit verifies from selected "RTD Settings.RTD Element(0x8xx2:19)" : Temperature in 0.1°C Resistance in Ohm Thermal contact NO: 1->open, 0->closed Thermal contact NC: 1->closed, 0->open

Entry.Name: Fuse I4T Load L1
Entry.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Fuse I4T Load L2
Entry.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Fuse I4T Load L3
Entry.Comment: Utilization of the fuses in 0.1%

Entry.Name: Frequency L1
Entry.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

Entry.Name: Frequency L2
Entry.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

Entry.Name: Frequency L3
Entry.Comment: Measured supply voltage frequency in Hz

Entry.Name: PCB Temperature
Entry.Comment: PCB temperature in °C
